volume_to_5d_average.formula: validated realtime volume_ratio when supplied, else intraday_amount/mean(last 5 completed-session daily_amount)

entry_quality.formula: 100 for confirmed shrink_pullback or volume_breakout; 50 for trend_unconfirmed; 0 for broken trend

d25_overheat_factor.formula: 1 if return_20d<=15; 1-(return_20d-15)*0.15/15 if return_20d<=30; 0.75 if return_20d>30; missing=>1

evidence_freshness.formula: newest valid news age: 100 through 1h, then 100*(72-age_hours)/71 through 72h

financial_deterioration.formula: 1 if revenue_yoy<=-10 or net_profit_yoy<=-20 or core_profit_yoy<=-20 else 0

major_shareholder_reduction.formula: 1 from controlling shareholder, actual controller or >=5% holder reduction plan through official completion/termination plus 90 days; unresolved remains 1

financial_fraud_history.formula: 1 permanently after official decision confirms financial fraud, false records or material omissions

official_investigation_history.formula: 1 during formal regulator, exchange or judicial investigation and for three calendar years after official close/withdrawal

major_illegal_history.formula: 1 permanently after official decision confirms major illegality

fund_occupation_history.formula: 1 permanently after official decision confirms funds occupation

illegal_guarantee_history.formula: 1 permanently after official decision confirms illegal guarantee

forced_delisting_risk.formula: 1 during forced-delisting proceedings and for three calendar years after official withdrawal/termination

corporate_risk_history_unavailable.formula: 1 when official severe-risk history coverage is unavailable or incomplete else 0

intraday_reversal.formula: 1 if completed_trading_minutes>=30 and (high-price)/high*100>=3 and close_location<=35 else 0

industry_strength.formula: winsorized average-rank percentile(mean valid industry pct_change)

market_breadth.formula: 100*positive valid stocks/valid stocks in identical data_version

negative_announcement_level.formula: max configured keyword severity over valid 180d announcements; empty_success=0

news_sentiment.formula: mean configured keyword-majority headline score over valid 0-72h news: positive=75, tie=50, negative=25

price_volume_divergence.formula: 1 if (return_5d>0 and intraday_amount/amount_median_20d<0.8) or (return_5d<0 and intraday_amount/amount_median_20d>1.2) else 0

short_term_overheat.formula: 1 if return_5d>=12 or return_10d>=20 or ma20_deviation_pct>=15 else 0

return_20d_not_overheated.formula: 100 if return<=15; 0 if return>=30; linear between

trend_breakdown.formula: 1 if ma20_deviation_pct<0 and ma_slope<50 and return_5d<0 else 0

volatility_20d.formula: population standard deviation of 20 daily returns in percentage points
